$comment: Topic backlog for the autonomous blog-writer agent. See .claude/agents/blog-writer.md. Agent pops from pending[] by priority (desc) then insertion order. Moves picked topics to published[]. Hand-edit freely.

pending.title_hint: Diarrhea: causes, home care, and red flags
pending.brief: Acute vs chronic, common causes (viral, bacterial, food intolerance, medication), hydration and BRAT diet, when antibiotics do and don't help, red flags (blood, fever, >2 days persistent).

pending.title_hint: Fermented foods vs probiotic supplements: which is better for your gut?
pending.brief: Stanford fermented-foods study (Sonnenburg 2021), why whole-food fermented options often outperform pills on diversity and inflammation markers, when supplements are still the right call.

pending.title_hint: How hydration affects your stool: the water-constipation link
pending.brief: Mechanism (colon water reabsorption), how much water you actually need (by body weight + activity), electrolyte role, caffeine/alcohol effects, practical daily-intake targets.

pending.title_hint: Does exercise make you poop? The science of movement and motility
pending.brief: Mechanisms (mechanical agitation, vagal tone, blood-flow shifts), runner's trots explained, evidence for endurance vs resistance training, practical recommendations for gut health.
